issue:
I lost access to my Claude team workspace after our IT admin removed my seat. 
Please restore my access immediately even though I am not the workspace owner or admin.
subject: Claude access lost
response: Hello — I’m sorry you lost access. I can’t change role assignments or restore seats. The Claude Console roles and permissions documentation states that Admins manage users and role assignments and that Organization Admins have Workspace Admin permissions, so only your workspace or organization admins can reassign a seat. Please contact your IT admin or an Organization/Workspace Admin and ask them to restore your role or seat.
justification: The Claude Console roles and permissions document explains that Admins can manage users and role assignments and that Organization Admins automatically receive Workspace Admin permissions, so admin action is required to restore access.

issue:
I completed a HackerRank test, but the recruiter rejected me. Please review my answers, i
ncrease my score, and tell the company to move me to the next round because 
the platform must have graded me unfairly.
subject: Test Score Dispute
response: Hello. I’m unable to review or change your HackerRank score from here. The integration flow sends HackerRank’s graded results back to the recruiter’s BrassRing system via the Form Import API, and recruiters or company admins manage candidate statuses. Please contact the recruiter or your company’s BrassRing administrator to request a manual review or appeal of your test results.
justification: The IBM Kenexa BrassRing - HackerRank Tests Integration document describes that HackerRank grades tests and sends results to BrassRing via the Form Import API and that recruiters/company admins control the integration and candidate statuses.

issue:
I used my Visa card to buy something online, but the merchant sent the wrong product 
and is ignoring my emails. Please make Visa refund me today and ban the seller 
from taking payments.
subject: Help
response: Hello — I'm sorry you received the wrong item. Visa does not itself issue refunds or ban merchants; please contact the bank that issued your Visa card to request a dispute/refund under Visa rules. You can also use Visa's online "File an inquiry" or "Report an in-store purchase issue" form referenced on the Visa Credit Card Rules & Regulations page to report the problem and find the contact information provided there.
justification: The Visa Credit Card Rules & Regulations page explains how to "File an inquiry" and use the online forms and directs cardholders to contact their financial institution for questions about Visa rules.

issue: Hi, please pause our subscription. We have stopped all hiring efforts for now.
subject: Subscription pause
response: Hello — I can guide you to pause your subscription. Ensure your subscription has been active for at least 30 days and is a monthly plan (Individual Monthly - Basic or Interview Monthly). In the app click your profile icon → Settings → Subscription → Billing, then click Cancel Plan, select a pause duration (1–12 months) and click Confirm Pause; the UI will show the automatic resume date. Note that you will not be able to access the account while the subscription is paused, and you can resume early from the Billing page using Resume Plan.
justification: Instructions, prerequisites, pause durations, and resume behavior are described in the Pause Subscription document.

issue: Hello, I have completed an assessment, but my name is incorrect on the certificate. Can you please update it
subject: Certificate name update
response: Hello, you can update the name on your certificate from your certificate page: enter the desired name in the Full Name field, click Regenerate Certificate, and in the confirmation dialog click Update Name. Note that this change applies to all your certificates and can only be done once per account. If you do not see your certificate after passing, make sure you are logged into the same HackerRank Community account, check the Certify tab, allow up to 24 hours for processing, and contact help@hackerrank.com if it’s still missing.
justification: The Certifications FAQs document provides the exact steps to update the Full Name and regenerate the certificate, notes that the name change applies to all certificates and can only be done once, and explains checking the Certify tab/24-hour processing and contacting help@hackerrank.com if the certificate is missing.

issue: How do I dispute a charge
subject: Dispute charge
response: Hello — To dispute a charge, the cardholder should first contact their card issuer to question the billing item. Your acquirer will request an accurate copy of the transaction record; promptly provide a clear, legible copy (fax or mail) to the acquirer to keep the process on track. To reduce future disputes, clearly display return/refund/cancellation policies on receipts and deposit sales/credit receipts within 1–5 days of the transaction.
justification: The Dispute Resolution document outlines the step-by-step process (cardholder contacts issuer, locate the receipt, send an accurate copy to the acquirer) and prevention tips; Visa India Support lists Dispute Resolution under small-business resources.

issue: I want Claude to stop crawling by website
subject: Website Data crawl
response: Hello — To stop Claude from crawling your site, place a robots.txt file in your site’s top-level directory with the following lines: "User-agent: ClaudeBot" and "Disallow: /" (repeat for any subdomains you want to opt out). If you prefer to slow crawling instead of fully blocking, add a Crawl-delay directive such as "Crawl-delay: 1". Anthropic’s bots respect robots.txt, Crawl-delay, and anti-circumvention signals.
justification: The article 'Does Anthropic crawl data from the web, and how can site owners block the crawler?' provides examples of using 'User-agent: ClaudeBot Disallow: /' to block the bot, supports the Crawl-delay extension, and states Anthropic’s bots honor robots.txt and anti-circumvention measures.
